name: libdevel-globaldestruction-perl
title: libdevel-globaldestruction-perl
summary: module to expose the flag that marks global destruction
description:
module to expose the flag that marks global destruction
Devel::GlobalDestruction is a Perl module that exposes the PL_dirty flag
to Perl as a subroutine named in_global_destruction. It is useful when
writing destructors, so that only non-process local resources are freed
while in global destruction.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdevel-globaldestruction-perl because module to expose the flag that marks global destruction.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdevel-globaldestruction-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdevel-globaldestruction-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdevel-globaldestruction-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
